title: A Turtle's Tale 2: Sammy's Escape from Paradise
original_title: A Turtle's Tale 2: Sammy's Escape from Paradise
overview: When Sammy and Ray find themselves trapped in The Tank, an underwater aquarium, they must hatch a plan to escape and reunite with their grandkids, Ricky and Ella, and protect them from the dangers of the ocean.
